raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Anderson Dam would not withstand an earthquake of magnitude 7.25 on the nearby Calaveras fault.",
    "The Anderson Dam would not withstand an earthquake of magnitude 6.6 on the Coyote Creek fault located directly beneath the dam.",
    "A breach of the Anderson Dam at full capacity would have catastrophic consequences, flooding an area extending more than 30 miles northwest to San Francisco Bay.",
    "The Anderson Dam Seismic Retrofit Project will help create 5,400 good-paying jobs beginning in 2021.",
    "The $576 million Anderson Dam Seismic Retrofit Project will have a multiplying effect on regional economic activity.",
    "Expediting the Anderson Dam project helps prevent future damage, disruption, and the loss of lives."
  ]
}
```
